docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOHN JAURIGUI FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALERT PEST CONTROL COMPANY, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM....... JOHN JAURIGUI FILED BY ALERT PEST CONTROL COMPANY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-07-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALERT PEST CONTROL COMPANY, INC. (JOHN JAURIGUI) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CASA SANCHEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALERT PEST CONTROL COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASA SANCHEZ $781.24 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $861.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $781.22 FILED BY ALERT PEST CONTROL COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASA SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED MAR-28-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASA SANCHEZ
